goal: 给 Catty v0 增加 accepted-memory writer 预检入口

summary.title: 增加 accepted-memory writer 预检入口
summary.what: 新增 src/catty/accepted-memory-writer-preflight.ts，从 pending catty_accepted_memory_write_requests 只读生成 future accepted-memory writer 的 matching receipt preview，并在 src/catty/accepted-memory-writer-preflight.test.ts 覆盖有 pending request 与缺表空预览两条路径；同时更新 src/catty/README.md 的链路说明和 CLI 入口。
summary.why: memory canary 已经能从 promoted apply plan 生成 pending write request，但真实 user memory writer 之前还缺一个可审计的合同预检层。这个切片让后续 writer 只能按 request 生成 matching receipt，再交给现有 receipt-backed apply commit 协议，推进 dogfood/canary 闭环同时保持不写正式 memory 的安全边界。
summary.user_goal: 给 Catty v0 增加 accepted-memory writer 预检入口

decisions.point: writer preflight 放在哪个边界
decisions.chose: 放在 pending accepted-memory write request 之后、真实 writer 和 apply receipt commit 之前
decisions.rationale: 这样可以先验证 request 到 receipt 的合同，不提前实现真实 user memory writer，也不绕过现有 receipt-backed apply commit 协议。
rejected: 直接在 apply preflight 中伪造 receipt
直接实现真实 user memory writer

decisions.chose: dry-run only，只读 pending request 并生成 receipt preview
decisions.rationale: 本轮目标是预检 writer 合同，不应写用户长期 memory、catty_memory_audit、apply receipt、canary status，也不应调用模型或接 heartbeat。

decisions.chose: receipt.memoryId 使用 request.proposedMemory.id，evidence 复制 request.requiredEvidence 并加入 request id
decisions.rationale: 后续 commitMemoryCanaryPromotionApplyReceipts 已要求 receipt memoryId 匹配 proposed memory；预检层先把这个合同显式化。

rejected.alternative: 在本轮实现真实 accepted-memory writer
rejected.reason: 会跨过用户记忆写入和安全审批边界，不符合 v0 当前只推进预检合同的切片目标。

rejected.alternative: 让 preflight 创建缺失的 request 或 audit 表
rejected.reason: 缺表应安全返回空 preview，避免只读 CLI 产生隐式副作用。

review_notes: 本轮实际 commit 为 bdedf09，代码范围是 src/catty/README.md、src/catty/accepted-memory-writer-preflight.ts、src/catty/accepted-memory-writer-preflight.test.ts。
Mainline prepare 的 diff_summary 包含 catty 分支从旧 base 累积的历史文件；preflight overlaps 已按同一 catty 分支连续切片分类，不作为本轮语义冲突。
工作区仍有无关 unstaged CLAUDE.md，未 stage、未提交、未纳入本轮。

验证：bun test src/catty/accepted-memory-writer-preflight.test.ts；bun test src/catty/accepted-memory-writer-preflight.test.ts src/catty/memory-canary*.test.ts；bun test src/catty/*.test.ts；bun test；CLI --help；空库 dry-run smoke；git diff --check；git diff --cached --check。

architectural_claims: Accepted-memory writer is a future boundary after pending write requests and before receipt-backed apply commit.
Writer preflight is read-only and must not perform user memory writes or Catty promotion commits.
behavioral_changes: Pending accepted-memory write requests can be previewed as matching AcceptedMemoryWriteReceipt objects.
Missing request table returns an empty preview without creating request, receipt, or audit tables.
CLI rejects --write and exposes only dry-run receipt preview output.
security_implications: No secrets are read or logged.
No user memory, catty_memory_audit, apply receipt, canary status, model call, heartbeat, or nightly runner side effect is performed.
migration_notes: No migration required; the preflight only reads an existing request table and returns empty output when it is absent.
